Off Calendar Oct-31-2016 Continued To Nov-14-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Mangini for petitioner Elizabeth Adler.

The Court noted that the required response to the examiner's notes has now been filed, but that the Court has not received courtesy copies. Mr. Mangini agreed to provide them. The matter was continued to November 14, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not reported)

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Jul-13-2015 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John A. Mangini, for petitioner Elizabeth Adler.

The Court inquired regarding authority for the position that the distribution should bypass the estate's sole designated beneficiary, and be distributed instead to the beneficiary's heirs. Mr. Mangini responded that the administrator was hoping to avoid another probate. He stated that the proposed treatment of investigator's fees as costs of administration would bring the estate under the $150,000 figure and no probate would be required. He suggested that the Court could continue the hearing for a short period to allow the administrator to submit an accounting if the Court so desired. The Court requested that counsel provide him with a proposed order, and the matter was taken under submission by the Court.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Craig Blackstone/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy K. Kabasares. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-16-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Ferdon for the San Francisco Public Administrator ("SFPA").

Mr. Ferdon stated that the SFPA was willing to take the appoinment but that he would require existing Counsel's services as he knew and had all the information on the case. The Court granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court). Bond was set at $200,000.00.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-02-2008 Continued To Jul-16-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
